activities.name: Calibrate the Pudding Telescope
activities.definition: Re-align the seventeen lenses of the institutional pudding telescope before the next viewing of the Great Custard Eclipse. Bring a soft cloth and an open mind.
activities.outputs: Calibration certificate (signed in jam)
activities.comments: Last calibrated during the Pancake Equinox of 2024 — drift is suspected near the third meridian.

notes.ocio: Issue formal pudding directive #2027-PUD-042 before tea.
notes.mission: Validate alignment against the official Custard Doctrine (Vol. III, Appendix Q).
notes.infra: Climb ladder. Twist knobs. Do not eat the lenses.
notes.cyber: Notify Command if the pudding becomes self-aware (signs: humming, blinking).
notes.vendor: OmniWhisk Inc. provides the recalibration arms (model PUD-X9).

activities.name: Standardize the almost-truth threshold
activities.definition: Set the official cutoff at which a claim becomes almost true.

activities.name: Pre-approve tomorrow's lunch today
activities.definition: Issue provisional lunch approvals 24h ahead, pending custard clearance.

activities.name: Clear the morning custard backlog
activities.definition: Drain the overnight custard queue before the 11:00 wobble inspection.

team-spoon-audit.R: Lends two spoons and a steady hand

activities.name: Inventory the ceremonial spoons
activities.definition: Reconcile the ceremonial spoon ledger against the velvet drawer.

activities.name: Reconcile improbable edge cases
activities.definition: Resolve approvals that are simultaneously granted and denied.

activities.name: Commission tasteful disaster posters
activities.definition: Produce motivational posters about failures that have not happened yet.

activities.name: Host the quarterly plausibility roundtable
activities.definition: Convene both divisions to rank this quarter’s most believable rumors.

activities.name: Negotiate with the Vanilla Cartel
activities.definition: Re-open trade discussions with the elusive Madagascar Vanilla Syndicate regarding wholesale pricing of Tier-S bean varietals. They prefer evening tea.
activities.outputs: Signed memorandum, possibly written in pod-ink
activities.comments: Do not bring decaf. It has ended past negotiations badly.

notes.mission: Lead the delegation; co-accountable for the relationship.
notes.cyber: Sweep the room for bugs (the listening kind, not the weevil kind).
notes.vendor: Cartel point of contact: Mr. Pod, c/o the Damp Greenhouse.

activities.name: Diagram emergency caramel evacuation routes
activities.definition: Produce evacuation diagrams for all caramel-zone facilities, accounting for slow viscous flow and stickiness coefficients.
activities.outputs: 12 evacuation posters, laminated against drippage
activities.comments: Caramel viscosity index updated quarterly by the Sugar Service.

notes.mission: Owns the evacuation plan approval and final sign-off.
notes.infra: Survey all buildings; also consult on doorway widths for fast-flow caramel.
notes.sw: Render diagrams in NoneCAD (license already procured).
notes.vendor: Caramel certifier informed of route changes.

activities.name: Recruit interdimensional whisk technicians
activities.definition: Hire seven (7) qualified whisk technicians from accessible parallel dimensions. Must own own whisk.
activities.outputs: Signed contracts on inter-dimensional vellum

notes.ocio: Receive resume scrolls. Do not read aloud.
notes.mission: Provide cultural orientation re: this dimension's tea customs.
notes.cyber: Background check across realities, with appropriate consent rituals.
notes.sw: Build candidate portal (now with chiffon mode).

activities.name: Audit the strategic flan reserve
activities.definition: Verify integrity, volume, and jiggle-factor of the national flan stockpile held at the Reserve Custard Facility.
activities.outputs: Flan audit report; jiggle measurements in standard wobble-units (sw)
activities.comments: Reserve quietly increased by 14% last quarter. No public statement issued.

notes.ocio: Sign-off auditor; reads jiggle summary in private session.
notes.mission: Receives the jiggle summary, files in vault.
notes.infra: Open vault, measure flan, do not breathe near it.
notes.sw: Spreadsheet of jiggles, sorted by wobble amplitude.

activities.name: Apologize formally to the meringue stakeholders
activities.definition: Issue diplomatic regrets to the Federation of Whipped Stakeholders regarding the unfortunate incident at last year's Egg Foam Forum.
activities.outputs: Apology letter, peaks stiff but contrite

notes.ocio: Signs the letter on official Custard letterhead.
notes.mission: Workshop the wording with the Diplomatic Pâtisserie.
notes.sw: Proofread for both grammar and tone.
notes.vendor: Cc'd as a courtesy; vendor caused the incident but is not named.

activities.name: Survey hippo emotional readiness
activities.definition: Quarterly mood assessment of the 14,000-strong migrant hippo collective ahead of the spring move. Includes wallow satisfaction surveys.
activities.outputs: Hippo Vibes Index (HVI) report, with sub-indices for grumpiness and hunger
activities.comments: Last quarter: 'cautiously optimistic, prefers Tuesdays, somewhat suspicious of birds'

notes.ocio: Review HVI methodology; suggest improvements without offending the hippos.
notes.mission: Hippo Wellbeing Lead — owns the entire vibe portfolio.
notes.infra: Notify pen designers of mood shifts; design accordingly.
notes.sw: Run the HVI app on the field tablets.
notes.vendor: Hippo whisperer consultancy provides edge cases.

activities.name: Charter the whisper escalation ladder
activities.definition: Establish who gets whispered to first when a hippo is moody.

activities.name: Draft the hushed coordination protocol
activities.definition: Define how to coordinate loudly important things very quietly.

activities.name: Run a silent communication drill
activities.definition: Rehearse a full migration briefing using only eyebrows.

activities.name: Ratify cabbage strategy doctrine
activities.definition: Adopt the leafy-but-firm posture for cross-vegetable relations.

activities.name: Lease 47 high-quality kiddie pools
activities.definition: Acquire 47 (forty-seven) small inflatable wading pools to serve as portable mud-staging areas during the long march.
activities.outputs: Lease agreements, pool inflation logs, mud levels
activities.comments: 47 was a compromise. The hippos wanted 53.

notes.ocio: Informed of leased counts and any pool defections.
notes.mission: Pool budget approver; absorbs hippo complaints.
notes.infra: Inflate, deflate, transport. Repeat at every checkpoint.
notes.vendor: Pool supplier: Splashco Industries (no questions asked re: 47).

activities.name: Translate aquatic memes into ungulate
activities.definition: Develop a translation matrix from internet aquatic-meme vernacular into the Hippopotamish dialect, preserving wetness and dignity.
activities.outputs: Meme phrasebook; YouTube channel with hippo-friendly captions

notes.ocio: Final approval of meme dignity standards.
notes.mission: Cultural lead; co-accountable for tone and reception.
notes.cyber: Verify memes are not subtle psyops by aquatic rivals.

activities.name: Draft the official hippo passport
activities.definition: Design a passport document for migrating hippos including bio page, watermark, chew-resistant cover, and emergency mud allotment.
activities.outputs: Approved passport design; manufacturing spec; pilot run of 12 passports

notes.ocio: Final design sign-off; will not approve glossy finish.
notes.mission: Specify ID fields: name, tusk count, wallow preference.
notes.cyber: Forgery resistance review (watermark must survive teeth).
notes.sw: Mock up the artwork in vector form.

activities.name: Stage rehearsal stampede (controlled)
activities.definition: Conduct a small-scale controlled rehearsal stampede to test signage, fences, announcer enthusiasm, and post-event mud cleanup.
activities.outputs: After-action report, possibly hoofprint-stained
activities.comments: Please notify nearby cafés in advance. They prefer 48 hours.

notes.infra: Set up, then review after-action observations.
notes.cyber: Review crowd-flow modeling for stampede integrity.
notes.vendor: Stampede choreographers (Gallop & Co.) provide the actual hippos.

activities.name: Entangle the cabbage with itself
activities.definition: Apply standard quantum entanglement protocol (Brassica variant) to a leafy cabbage and its hypothetical twin in superposition.
activities.outputs: Verified entanglement certificate; one (1) cabbage, possibly two
activities.comments: Do not observe the cabbage directly. It collapses into coleslaw.

notes.ocio: Informed of cabbage state but not its quantum amplitude.
notes.mission: Cabbage governance board sets entanglement ethics.
notes.infra: Lab setup; ensure proper photon-shielding curtains.
notes.sw: Owns the measurement code; do not deploy on Friday.
notes.vendor: Supplies entangled cabbage seeds (NurseryX, batch Q-17).

activities.name: Approach the self-resolving ticket singularity
activities.definition: Tune the queue until tickets resolve fractionally before being filed.

activities.name: Triage tickets that already closed themselves
activities.definition: Sort the spontaneously-resolved tickets by spookiness.

activities.name: Conduct poltergeist postmortems
activities.definition: Document why each ticket closed itself, for the haunting record.

activities.name: Publish white paper on leafy uncertainty
activities.definition: Author and submit a peer-reviewed paper articulating the Leafy Uncertainty Principle for the Journal of Improbable Vegetables.
activities.outputs: Published paper; plus tofu-flavored peer reviews

notes.ocio: Comment on tone; advise against the phrase 'leafy chaos.'
notes.mission: Authorship lead; first byline, last word.
notes.cyber: Be informed pre-publication for embargo timing.
notes.sw: Format LaTeX; fight LaTeX ghosts; format LaTeX again.

activities.name: Stand up cabbage observatory
activities.definition: Erect and commission a 12-meter telescope dedicated to surveilling cabbage fields under moonlight for nocturnal leaf activity.
activities.outputs: Live observatory; cabbage-feed dashboard with nightly highlights

notes.ocio: Approves construction milestones and lens choice.
notes.mission: Defines what constitutes a 'cabbage event' for the feed.
notes.cyber: Informed of any feed downtime or leaf-storm alerts.
notes.sw: Spec dashboards; coordinate with the moonlight calendar.
notes.vendor: Telescope vendor accountable for build quality and warranty.

activities.name: Recall the rogue radish prototype
activities.definition: Locate and contain the radish prototype that wandered off during last summer's experiment. Approach with calm and a leafy demeanor.
activities.outputs: Containment report; possibly radish (alive)
activities.comments: Last seen near the lettuce greenhouse, allegedly fraternizing.

notes.mission: Informed of containment; no comment requested.
notes.infra: Search physical sites: greenhouses, parking lots, the herb wall.
notes.cyber: Lead containment + consult on tracking telemetry.

activities.name: Catalog all umbrellas seen on Tuesdays
activities.definition: Maintain a comprehensive registry of every umbrella sighted on a Tuesday across all five districts, updated weekly with photos and parasol metadata.
activities.outputs: Tuesday Umbrella Catalog (TUC), version 41

notes.ocio: Approve catalog schema, especially the 'handle ornamentation' field.
notes.mission: Owns the registry and its integrity.
notes.cyber: Privacy review of umbrella metadata; no biometric tip-spikes.
notes.sw: Build and maintain the TUC system.

activities.name: Interrogate the Mary Poppins fan club
activities.definition: Conduct polite-but-firm interviews with the local Mary Poppins enthusiast society regarding recent levitation reports near the Council Building.
activities.outputs: Interview summaries; possible tea consumption notes
activities.comments: Bring sugar cubes. Declined biscuits will be offensive.

notes.mission: Lead interrogations from a position of polite curiosity.
notes.infra: Informed of meeting locations for security.
notes.cyber: Conduct interviews; record carefully; never sing along.

activities.name: Procure 12 gross of regulation rain
activities.definition: Acquire 12 (twelve) gross of certified regulation rain for use in the simulation chambers during quarterly umbrella stress testing.
activities.outputs: Delivery confirmation; rain receipts; certified humidity logs

notes.mission: Consult on rain blend (light drizzle vs. proper downpour).
notes.infra: Receive and store rain in the appropriate buckets.
notes.vendor: Regulation Rain Inc. (since the Downpour Act of '03).

activities.name: Verify umbrella alibi statements
activities.definition: Cross-reference statements submitted by registered umbrellas regarding their whereabouts during the Great Drip Event of last March.
activities.outputs: Alibi verification matrix; list of umbrellas of interest

notes.ocio: Informed of final disposition; will not comment publicly.
notes.mission: Verify alibis; pursue inconsistencies politely.
notes.cyber: Lead cross-referencing; consult on suspicious dripping patterns.

activities.name: Tune the reverberation chambers
activities.definition: Recalibrate all 8 reverberation chambers to the new whisper-grade specifications adopted by the Acoustic Council in February.
activities.outputs: Tuning report; resonant frequency table; one (1) very tired engineer
activities.comments: Whispers below 30 dB now considered non-detectable per the new code.

notes.ocio: Approve final tuning parameters in writing.
notes.mission: Consult on which whispers count as 'official.'
notes.infra: Physical tuning of all 8 chambers; bring earplugs.
notes.sw: Software-defined echo levels; ship a release candidate.
notes.vendor: Echo equipment vendor consulted on warranty implications.

activities.name: Hire a freelance echo wrangler
activities.definition: Engage an independent contractor with experience taming wild echoes and managing herds of reverb cattle in field conditions.
activities.outputs: Signed SOW; wrangler bio; reference recordings
activities.comments: Comfort with both classical reverb and modern feedback is essential.

notes.ocio: Approves contract terms including the 'lasso clause.'
notes.mission: Informed of selection only.
notes.sw: Consult on integration with the current echo-stack.
notes.vendor: Source candidates from the Independent Reverb Guild.

activities.name: Install new acoustic apologies
activities.definition: Install the new wall-mounted Acoustic Apology Panels (AAPs) in all 23 conference rooms to absorb both echo and regret in equal measure.
activities.outputs: Installation receipts; reduced regret index; signed acceptance form

notes.ocio: Consult on signage near each panel.
notes.mission: Apology program owner; defines apology vocabulary list.
notes.infra: Install panels in all 23 rooms per the floor plan.
notes.vendor: Panel manufacturer (Quiet Regrets LLC) supplies units.

divisions.name: Department of Things That Are Almost True
